CVE-2020-27813.title: An integer overflow vulnerability exists with the length of webso ...
CVE-2020-27813.summary: An integer overflow vulnerability exists with the length of websocket frames received via a websocket connection. An attacker would use this flaw to cause a denial of service attack on an HTTP Server allowing websocket connections.
